name: Pad Thai (Clark)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook, rinse and refrigerate the noodles ahead of time.
2. In a bowl, mix together the peanut butter, soy sauce or tamari, and brown sugar.
3. In a wok, sauté the scallions and garlic for a few minutes. You can also add bean sprouts at this point if desired.
4. Add the noodles to the wok and stir-fry them for about 5 minutes.
5. Pour in the mixture from step 2 and stir-fry for a couple more minutes.
6. Add the eggs, stirring until just set, then add the peanuts.
7. Continue cooking for another minute or two until everything is heated through.
8. Serve with lime wedges on the side.
From: qc@titan.ucs.umass.edu (Quentin J Clark)
